name: Midnight GT: Primary Racer
publisher: Funbox Media Ltd, ZOOM Platform Media
short_description: Take control of the streets of Japan in Midnight GT: Primary Racer. Race along country back roads or tight city streets and work your way up in the world. The only way to new places is to win!
detailed_description:
This fast and furious racing game is situated around the infamous exploits of the revered Japanese night racing fraternity, The Midnight Club.

With friends to impress and money to burn, these hot blooded individuals corrupt their cars by allowing specialist workshops to turbo charge and re-kit their motors in order to produce the ultimate thrill-seeking machines.

Features

  • Eight different racing environments and ten courses. Ranging from open forests and mountain courses to city and warehouse districts.

  • Street races take place on unofficial tracks, (also known as civilian roads) above and around the busiest cities in Japan.

  • An array of different game modes to select from: Simulation Arcade, Quick Race, Time Attack. Pininfarina Junior and Senior.

  • Eight exclusive car designs from the world famous automotive design agency, Pininfarina.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil
